description_long: This is a large, multi-functional office or study furniture unit featuring a combination of open shelves, closed cabinets, and drawers. The structure is primarily composed of dark wood with contrasting white or light gray panels on the sides and upper cabinet doors. The central section includes a spacious desk surface with a pull-out keyboard tray beneath, flanked by sets of drawers on both sides. Above the desk, there are two open shelves for books or decorative items, and the uppermost section contains several closed cabinets with small handles. The left side of the unit incorporates additional open shelving, while the right side is dominated by a tall, vertical cabinet. The overall design is modern and practical, suitable for organizing office supplies, books, and personal items in an urban environment.
description: A large, modern office or study furniture unit with dark wood and white panels, featuring shelves, cabinets, and drawers. It includes a central desk area, upper storage cabinets, and side shelving.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main desk area, open shelves, and the tall right-side cabinet with white panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and curved profile of the dark wood panels, with minimal visible features.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the layout of the upper cabinets, open shelves, desk surface, and drawer arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curved wood profile and the vertical structure of the unit.
